base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of enemies_atlas — a character (boss) from 1988 mega man 2. Enemy roster — Sniper Joe, Metool, Shotman, Telly, Lantern Fish, Robbit, Scworm, Fan Fiend, Springer, Pierobot, etc. 848×726. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Enemy roster — Sniper Joe, Metool, Shotman, Telly, Lantern Fish, Robbit, Scworm, Fan Fiend, Springer, Pierobot, etc. 848×726
